race.comment: THE ROOKIE (9) deep into the prep now and can bounce back from the better draw. Found plenty from the sticky gate with a tenacious third over 1181m at this track. Genuine top-three player. JADE TREES (1) rewarded for his consistency at second start for the new yard, with a dominant on-pace win as fav over 1200m at Coffs Harbour in a Super Mdn. Adept in all conditions and can keep the momentum going. REFEREES (2) bounced off his good debut fourth, with a commanding Maiden win over 1181m at this track. On the up but not sure where he lands from the awkward gate. Keep safe. GLAM (7) resumes after having mixed luck in her second campaign. Returns with the two trials from the awkward draw and not to be overlooked.
